p2.intro: After several years working in the hospitality and retail industries—where I developed key soft skills like
p2.middle: —I made a career shift into tech, driven by a passion for problem-solving and turning manual processes into

p3.intro: Today I split my time between shipping
p3.tail: to save teams hundreds of hours — always eager to keep learning and growing.

tech.title: Tech Stack
tech.subtitle: Tools and technologies I use to build full-stack apps and automations.

automation.title: Automation Developer
automation.description: I design and build automated workflows that eliminate manual work — connecting CRMs, payment systems, AI models and internal tools to keep businesses running 24/7.

items.descripcion: Galileo Psicólogos is a full-stack web application designed to provide an accessible and seamless digital experience for patients, focused on mental health services..
It is an AI-powered property management platform for private landlords that manages and solves different areas of concern for property owners.
AirB2B is a full-stack application inspired by Airbnb, focused on corporate accommodation.

caseStudies.title: Professional Projects
caseStudies.subtitle: A selection of automation projects delivered under NDA. Client names and screenshots are omitted; technical and business outcomes are real.

scheduler.heading: Real-time schedule optimization
scheduler.subtitle: n8n connects PowerBI exports with a custom web app, generating optimized shifts in minutes with full traceability.

docmanager.heading: End-to-end document automation
docmanager.subtitle: From upload to filed Modelo 620: a cascade of specialized AI models reads, validates and auto-fills every form.

callCenter.heading: Live AI voice agent
callCenter.subtitle: Twilio routes the call to a Node.js orchestrator that interprets intent with OpenAI, queries the DB and creates a classified ticket — all in seconds.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hi, my badge isn't working this morning.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me check that for you. Could you confirm your employee ID?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it. Raising a ticket with IT support right now.

items.problema: Fragmented manual schedule management consuming hours of labor, relying on scattered data from PowerBI reports.
items.solucion: n8n-based scheduler pulling data via PowerBI webhooks into a centralized web app for real-time management.
impacto: Process reduced from hours to minutes

items.problema: Manual processing of buy/sell files and tedious filling of official forms and legal documentation.
items.solucion: AI management system for profile processing, intelligent storage, and automated filling of official government models.

items.titulo: Live AI Voice Agent Call Center
items.problema: High call volume saturation and slow manual ticket creation and departmental redirection.
items.solucion: Live AI agent for telephone support, automatic incident ticket generation, and intelligent call routing.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: I'm always open to discussing new opportunities, collaborations, or just having a chat about tech. Feel free to reach out!
contact.ctaSubtitle: Let's discuss your next project and see how I can help bring your ideas to life.
